raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased an electric bike from XXXX for {$580.00} ( posted XX/XX/year>XXXX  ). Within 6 months the bike proved defective and unsafe : the rear wheel spokes repeatedly broke, causing instability ; photos also show uneven rear tire wear vs the front. I repeatedly sought help from XXXX and its vendor ; both refused any remedy, citing past 3 months. 

Amex closed my dispute strictly on the 60-day FCBA window and declined to consider the new evidence or any goodwill remedy, leaving me with a defective, unsafe product and no merchant support. Im asking Amex to reopen/review and provide relief ( credit or other resolution ) given the clear defect and merchant refusal. 

Thank you, XXXX XXXX
